entry.title: Re: Issue Importing Customer Master Data with Multiple Co...
entry.content:
Hi,

You can concatenate all key fields to generate your unique ID in SAC along with keeping all of them as properties.

Such as ID  = customer ID  + sales org  + distr channel + division or

concatenate with "_" like ID = "customer ID" _ "sales org"  _ "distr channel" _ "division" . Concatenate function should be available in import

entry.title: 未找到可用供应商的业务对象
entry.content:
需求：通过代码调用业务对象创建供应商，即 BP 的 FLVN01 FLVN01 角色

BP 的业务对象 i_businesspartnertp_3 中只提供了扩展角色功能，但是没有维护如 公司 和 采购组织层级数据。

单独查找供应商相关业务对象，只找到 I_SUPPLIERLISTTP_2 ，但是已经标记为废弃，是否有其他可用的业务对象，能创建和更新供应商的公司和采购层级数据？

entry.title: Re: Authenticating GitHub Actions Workflows Deploying to the SAP BTP Cloud Foundry Environment with
entry.content:
Thanks, Stefan, for this excellent and timely walkthrough! The use of GitHub-issued short-lived JWTs for authenticating CI/CD workflows with SAP BTP is a big step forward in reducing credential management overhead.

One point I’d like to highlight is the importance of carefully managing the helper user setup. While the approach is secure by design—leveraging scoped JWTs and identity federation—it's essential to ensure that:

  • The helper user has only the minimum required permissions (e.g., Space Developer).
  • Repository access and GitHub Actions execution are tightly controlled.
  • Token mappings are validated and monitored to prevent misuse.

With these safeguards in place, this setup offers a robust and scalable solution for secure automation. Great work!

entry.title: Re: How to bind to an existing service without knowing it...
entry.content: You can create a User Provided Service and bind this to your application. You must configure the UPS in every subaccount.

entry.title: Re: RAP Application Value Help Issue
entry.content:
Hi Andre,
Im also facing the same issue now, will upgrading the sap ui5 version will solve the problem ? 
Release - S4HANA on Premise 2022
UI5 Version - SAP UI5 1.108

entry.title: Re: MDG Consolidation using BP SOA service
entry.content:
Hi Titu,

Just sharing my thoughts

1) How will SOAP webservice trigger the consolidation steps automatically?

-> Please refer to this link on how SOAP will trigger consolidation. https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/6d52de87aa0d4fb6a90924720a5b0549/dbc19b55f22d7b43e10000000a4450e5.html 

In the Ch & Cr field you need to basically input the MDC process templates which needs to be triggered by the inbound SOAP service. For Create it has to be consolidation, while for change it has to be mass processing.

2) Is there any external system(any ETL tool) which will have to be deployed here to create the SOA message payload after extracting vendor data from the multiple source systems and publish that SOA payload for MDG/S4 HANA system to consume to trigger MDG Consolidation steps?

-> It depends on the system architecture, for data migration scenario its better to have a middleware to perform data transformation before loading into MDG

3) How will the data extraction take place from multiple source systems in this scenario?  

-> It can happen through custom programs, BODS, SLT etc.

4) Is there any background job to be scheduled at MDG side which will read the SOA payload and trigger the MDG Consolidation steps?

-> Its real time based on bgRFC.

5) In this case, will SOA payload populate all the Consolidation Source tables?

yes they will populate SRC tables as well as PRC tables.

Regards

Anirban

entry.title: Re: Exploring SAP Analytics Cloud Learning Journey Not Av...
entry.content:
Hi,

Try this plz https://help.sap.com/learning-journeys/500292207a261014b467ddb396b66331

You should see set of SAC learning journeys ( including the one you shared)

Some SAP Learning Journeys may require a subscription to the SAP Learning Hub to access full content  including live sessions, assessments or hands-on practice systems etc. Additionally, certain live sessions or events may be organised specifically for SAP partners which may require a partner S-user ID /  an invitation

entry.title: Re: DB Operation SELECT found (BSEG, see Note(s):0002431747) - ATC - S4 readiness
entry.content: It's all detailed in the SAP note https://me.sap.com/notes/0002431747

entry.title: Re: HR Trigger functionality is not automatically removin...
entry.content: Hi Divyesh, As part of the HR trigger configuration, our objective is to automate actions such as user lock, updating the "valid to" date, and role removal. While the configuration is successfully executing user lock and validity updates, it is not removing roles from terminated users as expected. I have gone through the all mentioned steps and below are my answers to. 1. Check BRF+ Rule for HR Trigger Here is our BRF+ decision table condition. When old value A1 change to new value A8 user should be terminated. Ensure the decision table includes the “Remove Roles” action for the termination event. (Where we need to include “remove roles” action in Decision table) 2. Yes, we are maintaining action type “Remove” for termination request. 3. Yes, we are maintaining request “Termination” 4. Maintain Role Removal Criteria Transaction: GRACV_REMOVAL_CRITERIA (T-code does not exists in system, Pl let us know the correct t-code if any) 5. Review Plug-ins and Communication Yes, required Plug-ins are already installed.

entry.title: Re: Create Import(Acquire) Connection at SAC with source...
entry.content:
Hi,

See this thread plz, hope it helps

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/acquired-data-model-in-sac-using-hana-cloud-as-a-data-source/qaq-p/13599215

entry.title: Re: Predictive Accounting in S/4HANA Finance (part I)
entry.content:
Hello @maria_ragaller 

Thanks for your message. Unfortunately the report FINS_PRED_REPOST is not longer supported. You may need to create new PO to get the figures updated.

entry.title: Re: CCM - use of Business Volume and Settlement Material
entry.content:
Hello @SD_Jedi ,

We have the similar requirement in our company. My proposal is based on what I did.

Here is my understanding of your business case:
MATNR is set up as a split criteria (Wich will take Invoiced article into settlement document)
But the requirement is only for Delta accrual/settlement - This is correct
For customer settlement (manual & automatic) - settlement material from contract should be considered.

Proposed solution:
For Automatic settlement:
We want different behavour in different settlement process - there is no standard configuration to support this. We have to use SAP Provided enhancement/BAdI to solve the business case.
For this I have used BAdI WB2_CC_SETTL_CHANGE_PARAM
You can delete MATNR from split criteria when the use case is not delta accrual.
e.g. when "cv_use_case ne cl_wzre_con=>co_use_case_type-contract_settlement_delta_accr "
Explanation: As per standard, settlement material from contract is taken by default, when MATNR is not passed or in case of No Business volume base.
What we are doing here is exactly that, we are not passing MATNR so that, settlement material from condition contract will be considered by default.

For Manual Settlement:
We have much more complex requirement and we are using BAPI simulation to also propose tobe paid. Therefore one solution works for both automatic and manual.
However, please check BAdI: WB2_CC_MAN_DOC_ENTRY --> Method CHANGE_BEFORE_BEFORE_ENTRY
You can derive CT_KOMLFP from IS_KOMWCOCOH.

Hope this helps.
All the best,
Aniruddha

entry.title: Re: Exploring SAP Analytics Cloud Learning Journey Not Av...

entry.title: Re: Responsibility Management: Create Your Rules (5/5)
entry.content:
Hi,

In case I want to create a customer Responsibility Rule of type SITO, I am unfortunately unable to perform all the steps. I have created a BAdI and linked a custom Responsibility Context to it. When I want to create a custom Responsibility Rule I want to add the Agent Rule by adding my Responsibility Rule ID. When I add that, I get the error that I need to add a data source and the linked field, but the pop-up for the data source does not contain any data sources. Any idea on how to fix it?

2470789 - SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit (Cloud) - Sample data migration templates

 

Thanks and Regards,

SAP Support.

Toni

For systems which are connected to the support infrastructure you can get an overview using the EWA Workspace. 
Should there be issues with this report, check note 1684537.

Best regards,
Tomasz

entry.title: Re: Mass activation of ODATA services in S/4 Hana
entry.content:
I tried this out. This added the OData Service in Maintain Service & Activate (/iwfnd/maint_service) .

But the ICF Node of the OData services were not activated. I then tried to activate the OData ICF Node via STC01 Task list - SAP_BASIS_ACTIVATE_ICF_NODES , but it did not activate the node but it works well with BSP & UI Node activation.
How to do mass activation Of OData Service ICF Node then ?

entry.title: Tr.CJ02にて、項目名を修正するためにノート3578470を充てたが、特定の項目しか修正されない
entry.content:
JFQ293の環境Tr.CJ02にて、項目名「Typ」が「プ」となっていた。

これを修正するためにノート3578470を充てた結果、基本データタブの「プ」は修正されたが、全般タブのは「プ」のままである。原因を教えていただきたいです。

entry.title: SAP Datasphere dynamic source filter
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to put a source filter on a Salesforce source (derived via open connectors), to give me a delta.

On the source and target table I have a LastModifiedDate  as a timestamp.

The source filter I am applying is LastModifiedDate Greater Than $MAX_VALUE_LastModifiedDate.

In theory this should return the MAX LastModifiedDate from the target and apply it to the source so we only ask for the delta.

For some reason when it runs its complaining about the format.

HTTP 400: {"requestId":"6866753ce4b04a35c8c7f206","providerErrorCode":400,"message":"Bad Request","providerMessage":"[{\"message\":\"\\nWHERE LastModifiedDate > 2025-07-02 03:08:49.000000000 ORDER BY Id\\n ^\\nERROR at Row:1:Column:3466\\nunexpected token: '03'\",\"errorCode\":\"MALFORMED_QUERY\"}]"}

If I hard code a filter like this..... LastModifiedDate Greater Than 2025-07-03T14:00:00.000Z it works as expected.

I can't see a way of adding a modifier around this so I can't force a format unfortunately. 

Any help with this or a work  around would be great

entry.title: I want to create a calculated KF in SAP IBP adding values of two stored KFs.
entry.content:
I want to create a simple calculated KF summing up values from 2 stored KFs at the same planning level.

Example: Totalqty@wkprodloccust= qty1@wkprodloccust+qty2@wkprodloccust

Why am i unable to view any output in the planning view?

note: 1) already considered UoM conversion 

2) also tried another calculation definition replacing the possible null values with 0

What other reasons could be?

entry.title: Actual release date is coming up blank in the production order when order is release via COHV/ CO05N
entry.content:
Hi,

In CO02 & CO03 the actual release date is coming up blank in the production order when the production order is released with COHV and CO05N. 

When it is released by CO02 & CO03 Actual release data is coming.

Please tell me the problem why actual release data is coming up blank in the Production Order.

entry.title: Re: Non-Recurring Deduction/Payments & Recurring Deduction in EC for replication
entry.content:
Hi experts,
We need to send some IT14 entries from SAP to SuccessFactors. These are variable entries that can be either positive or negative in nature and are not part of the employee's base salary. Should the portlet to be configured be the 'Recurring Deductions' portlet? If so, when we modify the API visibility on that portlet to allow writing from SAP, we receive an error. Could you let us know if this is the correct approach or if there are alternatives? Is it correct to use the 'Recurring Deductions' portlet?"

Thanks,

entry.title: Report of YCOA accounting accounts against alternative mapped accounts
entry.content:
Hello, SAP friends:

I'm trying to get a report showing the YCOA accounting accounts and the alternative accounts that those companies have mapped, but I can't get it.

I will comment in more detail with a concrete example.

I have this YCOA account: 6023000000

If I go inside and go to the Company Code Assignment section, I have an alternative accounting account (from a local chart of accounts) mapped to a specific company.


So, with this mapping what I want is to be able to see it in a table like the initial one. For example, adding the alternative account column to see this mapping.

6023000000 VS 0060221000

Would it be possible to do that in SAP?

Thank you in advance.

Best regards,

Ismael.

entry.title: Re: New End User File Upload in SAP Analytics Cloud QRC3 2024
entry.content:
Hi, 
thanks for the nice blog.

We try to play around with the script before and after upload and face the following problem:

How to get the status of the upload?

DataUploadExecutionResponseStatus.Success etc. are only constants. But how to fill the variable status in your script example with the correct status of the upload button?

As the script onBeforeExecution will be executed before the popup all scripts will be executed before the user selects the file or press cancel. Thus information if the upload will be canceled cannot be know at this point of time. If e.g. deletion is executed at this step, reversal of the deletion has to be implemented if the upload was canceled.

Thanks for any hints how to get the correct status and other experience with coding for this event.

Ulrich

Can you tell me: once a new schema in UTF-8 is available, what is the best option to create the repository on it ?
You mention a migration, but this is a fresh install and I don't want to burden the new CMS repository with any compatibility issue.

entry.title: Compensation Story Report - Fields exported by Employees
entry.content:
Hello experts.

My customer has requested a story report focused on the compensation statement. Specifically, one of the requirements, is for employees to export only selected fields relevant to their personal information. After investigating, I found that this might be achievable using Row-Level Security. Has anyone implemented this before or could suggest an alternative solution?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Partner TDD Onboarding for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition – Guide for Common Issues
entry.content:
Hi Abhijit,

We have setup SAP Partner TDD system in our landscape. It has provisioned the following systems

  1. SAP CBC
  2. SAP CALM
  3. SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud
    1. Tenant 100 Development
    2. Tenant 80 Customizing

 

We have a query where we are not using the standard demo data and want to setup our own data(e.g. Chart of accounts). Now from CBC we are unable to perform this activity in Dev(100) tenant and only do this in Customizing(080) tenant. I can understand this limitation, but if we are to then do the show and tell, should we do in Customizing tenant. Also further, if there are some custom developments, how can we test this with updated customization, as I understand there is no way to move customizing between the tenant(Similar to how we do in ECC world)

Please help us in this regard. We have gone through most of the links regarding partner TDD but could not find any update regarding this.

Regards,

Chaitanya

entry.title: Re: How to Get Email Alert for Failed Billing Job in SAP...
entry.content: This note does not have information on how email can be sent automatically when job is failed.

entry.title: 360° Feedback Form – Design Customization Options
entry.content:
Dear Community,

We have configured a 360° form for a customer within SAP SuccessFactors PMGM. However, our customer is currently not satisfied with the visual design of the form.

We would like to know if there are any options available for customizing the layout and formatting of the 360° form beyond the standard configuration?

Specifically, we would like to achieve the following:

  • Increase the font size of the competencies so that they stand out more clearly in the form
  • Change the placement of the competency description within the form to make it more prominent or better aligned with our internal expectations
  • Apply additional visual customizations, if possible (e.g. formatting, spacing, layout improvements).

Is there any way to implement such design-related adjustments, either through configuration or via custom XML/template modifications?

Best regards,

Leah

SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals

entry.title: Re: Exploring SAP Analytics Cloud Learning Journey Not Av...
entry.content:
I’m seeing the same content as you.Just the learning objective video and the live session/hands-on system. (Although I still haven’t fully understood what you meant by "secure area".)

I think the issue is that this might actually be part of a different learning journey but the link / learning journey you shared might be outdated. The one listed under the "SAP Business Data Cloud" learning journey has the same name "Explore SAP Analytics Cloud" I assume that's the updated version. Go to this learning journey and scroll down.

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/exploring-sap-business-data-cloud.

Select Below

Or alternatively, here in the list of all useful links to jump start SAC learning, the same learning journey (above one from BDC learning journey) is referred as "exploring SAC" - see page 6 

https://d.dam.sap.com/a/g8Qkcya/SAP%20Analytics%20Cloud%20-%20Everything%20You%20Need2Know%20to%20start%20with%20SAC%20-%20Extended%20Edition%20-%20November%202024.pdf?rc=10

entry.title: Re: Failed to commit objects to server : Undefined Info S...
entry.content:
@YvanBIf this is a new installation and the database uses AL32UTF8 as the supported character set, then everything should be fine—no action is required.

To create new or migrate an existing repository, use the CMS Database Setup located in the Central Configuration Manager.

entry.title: Re: How to get the content of a file selected via File Up...
entry.content:
Hello,

I have modified your code and below code will give you the base 64 value of the selected file. 

  var oFile = oEvent.getParameter("files")[0];


                if (oFile) {

                    this._oSelectedFile = oFile;

                    var oReader = new FileReader();

                    oReader.onload = function (oEvent) {

                        var sFileContent = oEvent.target.result;
                        var oPayload = {
                            FileName: this._oSelectedFile.name, // File name
                            MimeType: this._oSelectedFile.type, // File MIME type
                            FileContent: window.btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(sFileContent))) // Encode file content as Base64
                        };

                        var oTextArea = this.byId("fileContentArea");
                        oTextArea.setValue(oPayload.FileContent);
                    }.bind(this);

                    oReader.readAsText(oFile);
                }

Thanks

entry.title: SAP BAS Analytic List Page Error "aggregate based entities"?
entry.content:
Hi, 

i am trying to make my first Analytic List Page. I made the CDS Views and the Odata V4 Service. Now i am in the BAS and trying to Use the Floorplan and make the App. 

I have problems at the Point "Entity Selection", I tried to add different Annotations, but i still get the error: 

"The OData V4 service you have provided is not suitable for use in an Analytical List Page application. The service must contain aggregate based entities for this template."

Can someone help me or knows what i have to change? Regards Niels

entry.title: Exploring PostgreSQL on SAP BTP: From Free Tier to Production-Ready
entry.content:
The cloud journey often begins with experimentation and SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) makes this journey easy by offering a free-tier PostgreSQL service. Whether you’re building your first prototype, testing integrations, or preparing to scale, understanding how to start free and upgrade seamlessly is key.

In this blog post, we explore the advantages of using the free-tier PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, and how you can update to paid service plans when you’re ready to go beyond the basics.

Why start with Free-Tier PostgreSQL on SAP BTP?

SAP BTP’s free-tier PostgreSQL is designed for discovery, development, and skill building. Here’s why it’s a smart starting point:

⏺ No cost for getting started

You can try out PostgreSQL capabilities on SAP BTP without having any upfront costs, it's perfect for:

  • Prototyping applications
  • Running internal demos
  • Experimenting with new architecture designs

⏺ Fast developer onboarding

New to SAP BTP or PostgreSQL in the cloud? The free tier offers a low-risk ways to:

  • Test service provisioning
  • Build small apps using Cloud Foundry
  • Try database integrations with SAP services

⏺Skill building and learning

Free-tier access makes it easy for teams to upskill in cloud-native development, database management, and PostgreSQL-specific tuning within the SAP ecosystem.

⏺Accelerated Proof-of-Concepts

Quickly spin up a database for MVPs, PoCs, or hackathons. No more budget excuse to block innovation.

Moving beyond the Free Tier: upgrading to paid plans

Once your use case grows beyond the capabilities of the free plan—such as higher availability, greater capacity, or a move to production—you can upgrade to either the Standard or Premium PostgreSQL service plans.

⏺How to update your plan

Using Cloud Foundry CLI, you can upgrade your service using the below command or via BTP Cockpit update option:

cf update-service <instance_name> -p <new_plan> -c <update_parameters>
  • -p: Specifies the new plan (standard or premium)
  • -c: Allows configuration of memory, multi_az, etc. (Note: storage cannot be changed during update)

You can update:

  • From Free Tier ➝ Standard
  • From Free Tier ➝ Premium
  • Between Standard ⇄ Premium

Overview of paid service plans

  • Both plans support flexible sizing of compute and disk.
  • Use of fast storage, with optional Multi-AZ deployment for high availability.
  • The Premium plan offers more performance tuning and higher capacity support.

When to upgrade?

Consider upgrading from free-tier when:

  • You are moving into a productive workload.
  • You need increased memory, compute, or storage.
  • You require Multi-AZ deployments for higher availability.
  • You are facing usage limits or performance constraints on the free-tier instance.
  • Your are using the free-tier instance beyond the recommend time from SAP.

Learn more

SAP provides detailed documentation on service plans and entitlements in the SAP Help Portal – PostgreSQL on BTP. 

Wrapping up

Starting with the free-tier PostgreSQL on SAP BTP gives you a no-cost, low-friction entry into the powerful capabilities of SAP’s BTP cloud platform. When your application is ready to go to productive, the transition to paid plans is seamless, ensuring continuity without re-architecting your solution.

 
Thanks for reading!
For more insights from the product team on PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, don't miss to read:
  • PostgreSQL on SAP BTP - Are you looking for official blog posts? Blog INDEX
Regards, 
Antonio

entry.title: Enhance Your SAP SuccessFactors Deployment with the New CQC Service Update
entry.content:
We are excited to announce the release of an updated version of the CQC for Deployment Readiness service tailored for SAP SuccessFactors. This enhancement focuses on optimizing the analysis of the BizX Platform module, empowering our customers to fully leverage available functionalities and increase awareness of AI capabilities within their instances.

Why choose our Deployment Readiness Service?

The CQC for Deployment Readiness for the SAP SuccessFactors HCM Suite is an essential service designed to offer a comprehensive review of key settings before your system goes live. During this remote service, we conduct an in-depth analysis of your SAP SuccessFactors tenant, providing recommendations that align with SAP best practices for optimal configuration.

What´s new in this version?

Our latest update includes new checks specifically designed to review your organization's adoption of Joule and Generative AI technologies. These additions aim to ensure that you are fully aware of these advanced capabilities available within your environment.

Requesting this remote services

Remote Services can be requested via the Get Support application in SAP for Me (SAP Note 1296527). When submitting your request, please select:

  • Product: “Continuous Quality Check & Improvement Services”
  • Product function: “Service request for a Cloud Solution”

If you need assistance in submitting your case, you may contact your local Customer Interaction Center (CIC).

Please note the priority of these cases cannot be high or very high. This product and product function do not accept these priorities.

Learn more

For more detailed information, please refer to the service infosheet available on the SAP Support Portal. Here, you will find insights into the scope, key features, and benefits of the updated service.

Enhance Your SAP Experience with Value Maps 

Beyond EGI sessions, SAP Enterprise Support offers additional resources to help you drive innovation. SAP Enterprise Support value maps provide expert-led resources, tailored recommendations, and advisory services - all included in your SAP cloud subscription. Get started today: 

  • One-time sign up for SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support, using a valid S-User ID (please allow up to 2 hours for processing) 
  • Access SAP Enterprise Support value maps for personalized guidance 
  • Request a call with our solution area experts for tailored advice 

Value Maps are part of SAP Enterprise Support’s commitment to your success. Visit the SAP Enterprise Support value maps landing page to explore our range of topics and start engaging with us today. 

 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 

About the author: 

  • Alejandro Azcarate is a Global Topic Owner for SAP Enterprise Support value maps, specializing in SAP SuccessFactors HCM. Based in Madrid, Spain, Alejandro has been with SAP since 2007, holding various roles across the organization. Today, he focuses on helping businesses navigate HR transformation through SAP Enterprise Support offerings.  

Have questions, comments or feedback? Don't hesitate to comment down below or contact  
@alejandroazca

entry.title: Regional Leaders - SAP Champions Program
entry.content:
In July 2025, we see the introduction of Regional Leaders within the framework of the SAP Champions program in SAP Community. 

Business reasons:

  • Connecting SAP Champions more closely to one another, within regions - strengthening connections
  • Bridge the location gaps in the program, and time zone challenges
  • Extend the community team reach, outside of our time zones
  • Act as a catalyst to grow and scale the program in the future
  • Grow awareness of SAP Community and programs in different regions

What is a Regional Leader?

  • An existing SAP Champion who can communicate well with the program manager
  • A trusted SPOC for their region
  • Someone interested to help improve and grow the SAP Champions program
  • A catalyst person for attracting new talent to the program, especially in relation to diversity gaps (e.g. regions where we do not have any champions as of yet)

Meet Murali Shanmugham

 

Regional Leader APAC, SAP Champions Program

Global Business AI Strategy Advisor

Sydney, Australia

 

Meet Chandra Bhushan Singh 

 

Regional Leader APAC, SAP Champions Program

CSP

Gurgaon, India

 

* Note: in the pilot phase, we will focus on the APAC region - bridging the time zones to the community team (mainly based in EMEA, NA). This will help us to determine if the concept works, and can be rolled out globally.

For further information about the SAP Champions program - reach out to sapchampions@sap.com 

@Murali_Shanmugham | @ChandraBhushanSingh

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements RAP oDataV4: RichTextEditor in ObjectPage
entry.content: Hello Marian, thank you for your reply. But in the end it was easier than I thought. You actually only need the fragment and not even a line of JS. Thought you had to explicitly give it the binding, but as long as the value="{comment}" in the fragment is correct, it does everything automatically.

entry.title: Re: Integrate SAP S/4HANA authorizations into SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi @BhanuKancharla,

I also stumbled over the SUIM_AGR_1251_52. I think it is an error, such a table does not exist. Actually, for a table name it is also much too long. When I move on, I take the assumption that table AGR_1251 is meant.

Best regards,
Matthias

entry.title: Payroll Error (T512W)
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I hope this message finds you well.

I am new to SAP HCM and still in the learning phase. While running a payroll simulation, I encountered the following error: “No entry in table T512W for key 99 0001 for time 30.06.2025.”

I would be sincerely grateful if you could guide me on how to resolve this issue. Your support and assistance would mean a lot as I continue to build my understanding of the system.

Thank you in advance for your time and help.

Best regards,

A separate MDO for Work Center Hierarchy is a roadmap item, so stay tuned in the next releases.

Hope it helps! Manoel

entry.title: Re: New SDK behavior with Microsoft Visual Studio 2022 (Professional)
entry.content: I have been using the new MS VS 2022 Pro with the SAP extension, and I also see that the red tick is not disappearing after Check In of objects. This doesn't affect Assembling / download of the solution. Similarly, after modifying UI Screens, there will continue to be a person icon against uicomponent elements in the solution explorer. What is more frustrating is that I cannot see Trace.Info messages in debug, nor any other system messages. We need specific instructions on how to fix these issues. Searching the web and only finding non-SAP related fixes is not neccessarily useful. There is also an issue with a regular message that Framework .NET 4.8 is not assigned to projects (even after MS VS 2022 Pro re-install).

entry.title: Re: SAP DM - Add individual trigger in Automatic Triggers...
entry.content:
Hi,

New triggers must be implemented at solution development level, and cannot be added by end users. You can suggest new triggers via Customer Influence program.

Hope it helps! Br, Manoel

entry.title: GST Condition IN TRM
entry.content:
Dear Sir/ Mam


For maintaining GST detail business partner wise there is an app " Map tax cash flow to tax relevant cash flow" but while maintaining this System is asking to saving the same in transport request but as this is just a master data where we need to maintain these tax record at business partner level


Is their a approach to maintain the same directly in Production Server


Thanks


Prerana Sirohiya


PHONE_NUMBER


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: GST Condition IN TRM
entry.content:
For the configuration step Map Tax Cash Flow to Tax-Relevant Cash Flow (SSCUI 104121), the Redo in P System column is indicated as No. So, this SSCUI settings are transported from the Source system into the Target system and is not available to be maintained separately in the target/Production system.

You can also refer to the SAP Help Portal Manual Rework Activities in a Target System

entry.title: Re: Publish views from POD's to other users
entry.content: Hi! If my answer was helpful, please consider accepting it as solution.

entry.title: Re: Customer Project Grouping for reporting purposes
entry.content: Hi Divyesh. Are referring to SAP ByD or SAP S/4HANA? Because my question is SAP ByD relevant.

entry.title: Decimal Places Issue
entry.content:
During the implementation we encountered problems of decimal places, as per business requirement we have set 5 decimals for USD Currency and 4 for SAR however during test runs we have encountered overflow errors and expect this problem might aggravate in future.

Problems may occur on various accounts such as:

  1. Most standard tables in the system support a total length of 13 characters for currency values, which includes 2 decimal places by default. This leaves 11 digits for the actual amount, which is typically sufficient for standard business scenarios. However, increasing the decimal places to 5 (as in the case of USD) reduces the number of available digits before the decimal to 8. This significantly limits the value range and could potentially lead to data flow errors.
  2. Many modules and reports are designed to analyze currency amounts based on the standard 2-decimal format, like in FI - Financials are prepared on 2 decimals places. With extended decimal places, users may need to put in additional effort to interpret and reconcile data correctly in reports.
  3. In standard SAP architecture, currency values are stored in backend tables with 2 decimal places, regardless of the decimal configuration. When higher decimal precision is used, the system performs internal conversions to maintain accuracy. While this does not affect data write to tables, it may lead to performance lags during high-volume reporting activities such as monthly or yearly closures/reports as each and every value need to be converted before displaying in reports etc.

 

After internal deliberation we concluded to reverse the decimal places to 2 for that we need confirmation on the following course of action,

 

  1. We need a fresh instance other than current S4 DEV, QAS as the setting is already made with 4 and 5 decimal places and replicated on these instances 
  2. For executing the change and proceed with testing of processes/WRICEFs, apart from current MESC S4 DEV, QAS or PRD can SAP provide us a fresh separate instance without any cost
  3. Incase SAP doesn’t provide such non production instance then as a way forward we need to make a test client at PRD which can be deleted later if anything problem occurs. Does SAP have any objection in the approach
  4. Are there any notes/KBAs recommended by SAP to coup up with this problem
  5. From all audit perspectives does SAP charge anything in case a test client/Pre PRD is made for testing purposes 

Thank you,

entry.title: Re: Failed to commit objects to server : Undefined Info S...

I meant that I have this issue, but requested a new UTF-8 schema to replace the current one.

And do you know if this issue also concerns the Audit repository ?

entry.title: Re: Not getting calendar email notification
entry.content:
The issue was related to the email address that was used to send the notifications. We replaced the email address with the default sap notification one and then the members started receiving emails.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Review Task in calendar is not changing state from Open to In Progress
entry.content: The reviewer can view the approve/reject button on the story when opening it from calendar interface. But from the mail, its still not visible

entry.title: Re: ABAP Data Integration for SAP Business Data Cloud: configuration, performance, sizing
entry.content: @SreekanthSurampally no, in case of DS/DI interaction with consumer works via RDB (resilience data buffer) tables. APRS writes data into RDB buffer table after that DS reads from RDB buffer table.

entry.title: Re: Adjusting Reconciliation Account in Asset Accounting...
entry.content:
Read 3349022 - Manual posting on Assets Reconciliation Account in S/4HANA Cloud Public edition 

  • "Posting directly to Recon Accounts is not allowed and there is no chance to do it"
  • Asset Accounting (J62)

entry.title: Automating Flat File Loads in SAP Datasphere Using Generic SFTP Connections
entry.content:
With Datasphere release 2025.11, SAP introduced a powerful new feature: the Generic SFTP Connection. This enhancement significantly simplifies and automates the process of loading flat files into Datasphere.
Traditionally, users had to manually upload each flat file, which was cumbersome especially when dealing with multiple files. Now, with Generic SFTP, the process can be fully automated using scripting (e.g., Python), resulting in faster and more efficient bulk data ingestion.

This blog walks you through a basic method to leverage the Generic SFTP connection as a source object in a Data Flow. File formats currently supported include:JSON, JSONL, CSV, XLS, XLSX, ORC, and PARQUET.

Key Benefits

  • Automates repetitive flat file loads
  • Supports bulk data ingestion
  • Can be orchestrated using SAP Integration Suite or custom scripts (e.g., Python)

Prerequisites

  1. Valid Generic SFTP Connection
  2. Source File Availability

Steps to Load Data from Generic SFTP

First, you need to create a Data Flow to handle how the data will be ingested when transferred to generic SFTP

  • Go to the "Sources" tab in the Data Builder. Expand the "Connections" folder, navigate to the SFTP connection, and select the folder containing the source file.

 

  • Drag and drop the file onto the canvas.
  • (Optional) Click "Modify" to edit columns if needed. You can rename, remove, or change data types.

  • Click the source node and choose "Add Table" to create a new target table.
  • Click "Create and Deploy Table".
  • Choose the appropriate load Mode:
    • Append – Add new records to existing data
    • Truncate – Clear existing data before loading
    • Delete – Remove existing records based on matching keys before loading
  • Run the Data Flow to load data into the target table.

Example Use Case: Automating Product Image Integration

Our organization leveraged the Generic SFTP Connections feature in SAP Datasphere to automate the integration of product image data into Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC). Here's how the solution was implemented:

  • A third-party system generates a flat file containing Product IDs and corresponding image URLs every time a new product is added.
  • For the initial load, we used a Python script to transfer this file to the SFTP server. A Dataflow configured in Append mode then loaded the file into a target table in Datasphere.
  • To incorporate the image URLs into the data model, we extended the Product Master Data dimension in Datasphere by adding a new attribute for the image URL. The semantic type of this attribute was set to "Image URL".
  • This enhancement allowed seamless integration into existing SAC dashboards, enabling dynamic display of product images.
  • For ongoing daily updates, we scheduled the Dataflow to run automatically. SAP Integration Suite transfers the updated file to the same SFTP folder each day, using a consistent file name to support full automation.

End result

# Generic script to transfer file to SFTP Server
# Be sure to change the source file and destination folder name
import paramiko
import os
# === SFTP connection details ===
hostname = <enter SFTP host> 
port = 22  # Usually 22 for SFTP
username = <enter user name> 
password = <Enter password> 
# === Local file and remote folder ===
local_file_path = < Source File name with Path> 
remote_folder_path = <Target Destination>    # No filename, just the folder

def upload_file_sftp():
   try:
       # Extract just the filename
       filename = os.path.basename(local_file_path)
       remote_file_path = os.path.join(remote_folder_path, filename).replace('\\', '/')

       # Connect to SFTP
       transport = paramiko.Transport((hostname, port))
       transport.banner_timeout = 10  # Prevent timeout errors
       transport.connect(username=username, password=password)

       sftp = paramiko.SFTPClient.from_transport(transport)

       # Upload the file
       print(f"Uploading {local_file_path} to {remote_file_path}")
       sftp.put(local_file_path, remote_file_path)
       print("Upload successful.")
       sftp.close()
   transport.close()

   except Exception as e:
       print(f"Error occurred: {e}")

if __name__ == "__main__":
   upload_file_sftp()

Conclusion

This new feature drastically streamlined data ingestion pipelines and reduced manual effort for teams managing frequent flat file loads. By combining Datasphere’s Generic SFTP connections with automation scripts, organizations can achieve fully managed and scalable data pipelines

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 Crystal Report
entry.content:
Hi,

• Don’t use Report Footer A – it doesn’t support multi-page growth.
• Create a subreport for Terms & Conditions:
• Insert UDF text field in Details section.
• Set the text object to "Can Grow".
• Insert sub report into Report Footer B or Group Footer.
• In Format Sub report:
• Check "Can Grow".
• Uncheck "Keep Object Together".
• Place page numbers in the main report’s Page Footer, not inside the sub report.

Regards,
Faraz Maqsud.

entry.title: EUDR e come prepararsi con SAP Green Token
entry.content:
La tua azienda ha iniziato a prepararsi per la normativa dell’Unione Europea sulla Deforestazione (EUDR)?

Essa impone nuovi obblighi per le organizzazioni che importano ed esportano le seguenti commodities e i loro derivati da e verso l’Unione Europea: cacao, caffè, soia, olio di palma, legno, gomma naturale e bestiame.

Dal 30 dicembre 2025 per i grandi operatori e dal 30 giugno 2026 per le PMI, sarà necessario dimostrare che suddette commodities non contribuiscano alla deforestazione.

Le soluzioni SAP possono supportarti e aiutarti a rispettare questi obblighi, dimostrando l’origine delle tue materie prime e gestendo la dichiarazione di dovuta diligenza.

Unisciti a noi e ascolta direttamente dai nostri esperti come SAP può aiutare la tua azienda a prepararsi al Regolamento dell’Unione Europea sulla Deforestazione (EUDR).

 

Ti aspettiamo!

entry.title: Re: RAP List Report aggregation missing only in deployed...
entry.content: Manifest.json "sap.ui.generic.app": { "pages": { "ListReport|YourEntity": { "component": { "name": "sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ListReport", "settings": { "tableSettings": { "type": "AnalyticalTable" } } }, ... } } }

entry.title: SAP FSM Smartforms and Business Rules
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a business rule that once a smartform is created, it will send informations to CPI using Action webhook, then CPI will fill the chapter 2 of the checklist.

The problem is that the technician have to exit the checklist, synchronize several times, then come back to fill the checklist.

Is there a solution to force synchronization automatically ? or maybe a different way to do this ?

 

Thank you

 

Bests,

entry.title: Re: Integrate SAP S/4HANA authorizations into SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
HI @BhanuKancharla  and @wagenbma ,

it is a view that is probably only introduced with a certain S/4HANA version.
It is a join of AGR_1251 and AGR_1252 (to cover organizational levels in roles).

Best regards,
Jens

entry.title: Re: FMS,SAP B1 HANA
entry.content:
Try This !

SELECT
IFNULL(
ROUND(
ABS(SECONDS_BETWEEN(
CAST(TO_TIME($[OWOR.U_F_OUT]) AS TIME),
CAST(TO_TIME($[OWOR.U_F_IN]) AS TIME)
)) / 3600,
2),
0)
FROM DUMMY

SELECT
$[$RDR1.Price.Number] * $[$RDR1.DiscPrcnt.Number] / 100

Regards,
Faraz Maqsud.

entry.title: Re: Notas Fiscais não processadas após execução do job ED...
entry.content: Thank You Divyesh! "About this part: Edit the job variant for EDOC_BR_DISTDFE_RETRIEVE: Add a buffer time (e.g., retrieve documents up to 10 minutes in the past). Add retry attempts if available. I didn’t understand where this 'buffer time' parameter is located."

entry.title: EWM Outb. delivery: Overdeliver on purpose without flag "unlimited overdelivery"
entry.content:
Hi all,

we are implementing a logic in our EWM that allows to either make an under- or overdeliver for an outbound delivery item on purpose. That means we want to use the precentage values "overdelivery" and "underdelivery" from the delivery item.

Right now it seems, that creating WTs that add up to more than the originally required quantity is not allowed if the flag "unlimited Overdelivery" (Field /SCDL/DL_DELTERM_STR-TOL_OVERUNLTD ) is NOT set in the delivery item, no matter if the percent values are populated. We do not want to use that flag in our deliveries but the percentage values instead, so we decide which quantity would be OK for the customer (e.g. -10%, + 10%). Does anybody have experience how to circumvent this flag (it is checked in include /SCWM/LTO_WHRF54, "IF ls_whr_item-delterm-tol_overunltd ... ) ? Is there a badi, user exit whatever? Thank you

entry.title: Re: XSUAA Local Testing
entry.content: What is the process for Deployed Version ?

entry.title: Re: How to Get Email Alert for Failed Billing Job in SAP...
entry.content: Please go through my comments once again where I have clearly asked to check the help documentation shared in the note.  Yes the SAP note does not have any explanation but you need to go through the link shared under Resolution.

entry.title: Re: VIEW Plugin Deployed to CF, but Not Visible in POD De...
entry.content:
Hi,

I suggest using the guide provided by Manoel. Although it's intended for standard plugins, you can apply the same approach to custom pod plugins as well (inside dm-podplugins-extensions folder!).

The guide includes plenty of examples, and if you deploy your application by simply building the MTA files, everything should work smoothly.

You can follow the steps in that guide and then adjust your code based on the differences between your implementation and what's in the repository.

Best,
M.

entry.title: Re: Internal Hiring: Recruiting-to-Employee Central
entry.content:
@Rac : if you are looking at Rec>>ONB>>EC (CRB), you will have to specify event reason in Crossboarding event reasons that will identify that specify event reason coming from RCM and trigger Crossboarding event.

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Data Replication Framework with SOAP without SLD in S/4Hana on-premise

entry.title: Re: work center member in Manage work center in SAP DM
entry.content:
In the meantime that SAP is going to release it officially you could also think by using custom fields.

Just report the hierarchy as custom fields for your workcenters.

entry.title: Down Payment at header level of a Sales Order
entry.content:
Hello SAP team,

I have some questions regarding down payment at header of a sales order.

1. Is it possible to enable a billing plan at header of a sales order? If yes, how do i achieve this?

2. How does a down payment at header level of a sales order works?

3. Is it possible to use percentage based and not value based?

Thanks for your inputs

entry.title: S4HPC - Clear Outgoing Payments: Journal Entry Payment Block BAdI
entry.content:
HI all.

In S4HANA Public Cloud while Clearing Outgoing Payments i need set up field Payment Block for JE automatically. 

Questions: 

  • Is there any appropriate BADI for it?
  • Where this field get stored for JE? Which CDS/API i can use to retrieve it in Developer Extensibility?

Steps to reproduce my scenario:

  • App: Clear Outgoing Payments - Manual Clearing -> Clear Open Items -> Make Posting against JE

  • When JE is posted, go to app: Manage Supplier Line Items -> i need field 'Item Payment Block' is set up = A

We can block payment manually, but how do it automatically via Developer Extensibility?

Regards

Vitali
